description_long: This is a tall, ornate Celtic cross gravestone set atop a rectangular stone base, surrounded by a patch of grass and scattered stone fragments. The cross features a circular ring connecting the arms, with intricate carved patterns and motifs visible on its face. The base is composed of weathered stone blocks, some of which are slightly misaligned, giving a sense of age and exposure to the elements. The surface of the cross and base is mottled with lichen or moss, adding to its aged appearance. The overall structure is robust and solid, likely carved from granite or a similar durable stone. No visible inscriptions or text are present on the cross or base.
description: A weathered Celtic cross gravestone with intricate carvings, set on a stone base and surrounded by grass and stone debris.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the cross and the layered stone base, with some grass and stone fragments visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the detailed carvings on the face of the Celtic cross and the rectangular stone base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the cross's profile and the uneven stone base.
description_view_3: Rear view of the cross, displaying the back of the carved cross and the stone base with visible weathering.
